text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, not long after the successful series with
Daiwa Scarlet, I find myself working in my office
as usual.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Being the trainer of the number one Umamusume
means making time for the press in my schedule.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My desk creaks under the weight of several stacks
of paper. The deadlines are still a ways away, but
I might pull an all-nighter tonight to get it all out
of the way...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Trainer! It's time! Where are you?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Don't act like you don't know! Remember that
thing I gave you that one time in the shopping
district?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That one time in the shopping district? She can
only mean...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You keep it for now. I don't think I can trust
myself with it.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: But you'd better not use it on yourself! It's my prize, got that?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
The hot spring coupon! It expires this month,
right?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Ugh! Come on, what are you waiting for?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
We need to find it! Good grief, look at this desk!
It's a complete mess!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I'll help you out, so come on, let's go!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: To the hot spring!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet pesters me into planning an
impromptu hot spring trip.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Soaking in the hot spring...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Mmm... Ahhh... The hot water felt so good.
choice_data_list: You look like you've been enjoying yourself.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Hehe, maybe a bit!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
What about you? Are you feeling relaxed? Like
you can finally take it easy for once?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'd like to say yes, but she basically dragged me
here. I'm more confused than anything.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...Hmph.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
All right, fine. I'm sorry I forced you into this out
of the blue.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: But you're also to blame, you know?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
The Twinkle Series is finally over, so this should
have been the perfect time...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: But you're always so busy.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Obviously, you have a lot more on your plate
than most people, being in charge of the number
one Umamusume and all.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
But seeing you working yourself ragged makes me
kind of mad.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I start to wonder why you're the only one
exhausting themselves, you know? Aren't we
supposed to face our obstacles together?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Do you really feel like you can't come to me for
support?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
It's not? Great. Then give me a chance to show
you I care.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Let me carry your burdens sometimes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's then that I remember what she said when she
won the hot spring coupon.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I don't think so. I mean, we're in the middle of a
very important series. Neither of us have time to
take a break just yet.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I want to make the most of this chance to relax...
and I want you to make the most of it too.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...What? You're looking at me weird.
choice_data_list: All right. I'm in your care.
All right. I'm in your care.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Hmph. Glad you finally get it.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Now, let's enjoy ourselves! We came here to get away from work, remember?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I won't let you leave until you've taken a proper
break! Hehe. You'd better relax as hard as you
can!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Swept up in Daiwa Scarlet's momentum, I enjoy a
long overdue vacation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Days later and feeling completely refreshed, I
finish off the rest of my workload... with Scarlet's
help, of course.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I sense that Daiwa Scarlet and I have formed an
irreplaceable bond during this time together.
